title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official repo: bundles Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. into a single Go binary with a REST/CLI interface.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; identical API surface to Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter exposing Ollama models as LLM & chat components; integrates with chains, agents, retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-like web frontend for any Ollama model; multi-user, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion engine via VS-Code extension.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for private Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and explain code using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot that forwards messages to Ollama and streams responses back to users.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for C#, Go, Rust, PHP, Ruby, Swift, and Dart.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of Modelfiles for Llama-3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, Vicuna, and dozens more.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up ephemeral Ollama services inside CI pipelines for testing AI features.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js middleware that exposes Ollama endpoints with API-key auth and rate limiting.
